title: 76 X 51 X 2MM BALL BEARING BUTT HINGE
features: Carlisle brass hin1322snp euro spec ball bearing hinge, satin nickel plated, 76 mm x 51 mm x 2 mm
description: From the brand Previous page Carlisle Brass prides itself on supplying Architectural Ironmongery for over 30 years to commercial and domestic markets. With the widest range of iromongery in the UK, there is something for every style. Visit our store to see more. Visit the store What makes our products unique? Working with architects and specifiers gives us a real insight into current market trends ensuring our product range is bang on trend. Why we love what we do? There is nothing that we value more than seeing our architectural ironmongery addding the finsihing touch to a home or space. The devil really is in the detail! Can I change my ironmongery? Ironmongery is a really easy way to update a space, with a few easy measurements and checks, you can make sure that any replacements are compatiable with your current doors. We are proud to be a registered member of the Guild of Architectural ironmongers. Our team includes 10+ qualified RegAI members who have an average of 15 years industry experiece (our longest is 30 years!) There isn't anything to know about ironmongery that we don't know!! We take great care in the sourcing and manufacturing of our products. Working together with the Supply Chain Sustainability School we have recently achieved GOLD status. The only ironmongery manufacturer to do so. Next page
